name: store-locator
title: Store Locator
description: Searchable store list synced with map markers.

files.content:
export interface Store {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  address: string;
  neighborhood: string;
  phone: string;
  hours: string;
  openNow: boolean;
  lat: number;
  lng: number;
}

export const MAP_CENTER: [number, number] = [-122.4194, 37.7749];

export const stores: Store[] = [
  {
    id: "ferry-building",
    name: "Ferry Building",
    address: "1 Ferry Building",
    neighborhood: "Embarcadero",
    phone: "(415) 555-0142",
    hours: "7:00 AM – 8:00 PM",
    openNow: true,
    lat: 37.7955,
    lng: -122.3933,
  },
  {
